title: lagurus ovatus subsp. nanus
intro: Lagurus ovatus subsp. nanus, also known as Dwarf Hare's Tail, is a compact, ornamental grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. It is primarily valued for its decorative purposes, but it also possesses medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been traditionally used to promote digestive health, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues, offering a range of health benefits. Lagurus ovatus subsp. nanus is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or dried powders to harness its medicinal properties.
